questions.question: Which type of rural settlement is most common in the northeastern states and Northern Plains of India?
What types of climate and vegetation characterise the Taiga natural region?
The Indus River system includes all of the following rivers EXCEPT:
Through which of the following states do the Western Ghats pass?
Why is canal irrigation more suitable in the northern plains of India?
questions.option_1: The area suffers from very low annual rainfall.
questions.option_2: The surface is uneven and covered with hills.
questions.option_3: The flat land and perennial rivers support canal networks.
questions.option_4: The rivers flow only during monsoon season.

questions.question: Chilika Lake and Pulicat Lake are located in which of the following?
The neighbouring countries Peru and Chile are located in which continent?
Which of the following rivers flows through a small part of the Great Indian Desert?
Sharing borders with the states of Kerala and Karnataka, Mudumalai National Park of Tamil Nadu is a part of which biosphere reserve of India?
The Pochampad Dam is also known as _____________.
The Koyna Project is constructed on a tributary of the River Krishna in which state?
Which crop is primarily associated with plantation agriculture in Kerala?
The Himalayan Mountain ranges stretch in a west-east direction from the Indus River to which major Indian river?
The western coastal plains are an example of:
In which of the following groups of states are the lower regions of the Western Ghats located where subtropical vegetation is found?
Which type of weathering is primarily involved in the enrichment of bauxite and other ores?
Western disturbances mainly affect the weather of which region in India?
Which of the following factors DOES NOT directly influence population distribution in India?
Birch and Rhododendrons are found in which kind of forests?
questions.option_4: Tropical Evergreen and Semi Evergreen forests

questions.question: What is the general slope of the Deccan Plateau?
Canal irrigation is best suited for which of the following geographical regions?
The largest area of the Great Indian Desert in India is located in which state?
Which of the following Indian states is bordered by both the Bay of Bengal and the Eastern Ghats?
According to the National Forest Policy 1988, how much percentage of the total area of the country should be under forest in order to maintain ecological balance?
Which of the following pairs of Indian states share international borders with Bangladesh?
